rpaq_1.Description: Yelled at others when they have annoyed you?

rpaq_2.Description: Had fights with others to show who was on top?

rpaq_3.Description: Reacted angrily when provoked by others?

rpaq_8.Description: Damaged things because you felt mad?

rpaq_9.Description: Had a gang fight to be cool?

rpaq_10.Description: Hurt others to win a game?

rpaq_11.Description: Become angry or mad when you don't get your way?

rpaq_12.Description: Used physical force to get others to do what you want?

rpaq_13.Description: Gotten angry or mad when you lost a game?

rpaq_14.Description: Gotten angry when others threatened you?

rpaq_15.Description: Used force to obtain money or things from others?

rpaq_16.Description: Felt better after hitting or yelling at someone?

rpaq_18.Description: Made obscene phone calls for fun?

rpaq_20.Description: Gotten others to gang up on someone else?

rpaq_21.Description: Carried a weapon to use in a fight?

rpaq_22.Description: Gotten angry or mad or hit others when teased?

rpaq_23.Description: Yelled at others so they would do things for you?

rpaq_score_proactiveTotal.Description: Proactive aggression total: sum of items 2,4,6,9,10,12,15,17,18,20,21,23. n/a if any contributing item missing.

rpaq_score_reactiveTotal.Description: Reactive aggression total: sum of items 1,3,5,7,8,11,13,14,16,19,22. n/a if any contributing item missing.
